title: team - Veil | engineered shading
paragraphs: portfolio. services. team. innovation. sustainable design. about. contact.

An advocate of thoughtful and purpose-driven design, Ben focuses on improving the status quo and delivering novel solutions to his clients. Ben has a wide array of experience with nearly a decade as a mechanical engineer specializing in healthcare and large venue design through numerous methods of project delivery. Ben brings his experience to Veil alongside his twin brother Adam - offering a first-of-its-kind solution to shading design and construction.
Bachelor of Science in Architectural Engineering

Detail, coordination, and completeness. All are critical aspects of any project delivery in the AEC industry that Adam has spent years focusing on as a project manager, lighting designer, and practicing electrical engineer on many K-12 and higher education projects across the country. Adam brings these skills to Veil to design and deliver industry-leading automated shading systems with his twin brother Ben. His goal: To redefine what it means to properly design, build, and commission an intelligent shading system in modern buildings.
Bachelor of Science in Architectural Engineering
